title: chelyella serrulata
intro: Chelyella serrulata, also known as Chelidonium majus or greater celandine, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the poppy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chelyella serrulata include its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antitumor activity. Chelyella serrulata can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical cream, and its active compound, berberine, is also used in herbal supplements.
